text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! So... many... people! And they all have a
twinkle in their eye.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, Rice Shower and I are watching the spring
Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One week ago, during training...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Wheeze... wheeze... Rice... wait up...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh? Wh-wh-what is it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
(This is Sakura Bakushin O. She's in Rice Shower's
year, and she excels in sprints.)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
To tell you the truth, I have some class
representative responsibilities I was supposed to
take care of, but I decided to run with you
instead.
choice_data_list:
(I don't remember her asking for a partner
run...)

(I don't remember her asking for a partner
run...)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Your stamina is off the charts! So I'm going to
make a suggestion!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
As a fellow long-distance runner, I want you to
come watch the spring Tenno Sho with me!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: You want to watch the Tenno Sho... together?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yep, together! Working with my fellow classmates
to help them discover their hidden talents is one
of my duties as class representative, after all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While I wouldn't call it a "hidden" talent, Sakura
Bakushin O is correct. Rice Shower has what it
takes to be a long-distance stayer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And the spring Tenno Sho may someday be a goal
of hers.
choice_data_list: Guess we're going to Kyoto then.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: A-are you sure?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yay! I would have been so lonely going on my
own! Also, we have a snack budget of 300 yen!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Actually... it kind of feels like we're going on a
field trip. Hehe, I'm getting excited!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Rounding the fourth corner with 600 meters left
to the finish line, the leader is... Mejiro McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Gooo, McQueen! Make them eat your dust!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! This is a close one! I'm gonna go get a
better view.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen is widening her lead! No matter
how hard the racers behind her run...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
They can't reach her! No one can come close to
her!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
In a display of incredible speed, Mejiro McQueen
crosses the finish line in first! What a sight!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Congrats! Good job, McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, everyone! It's thanks to your support
that I managed to seize victory!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
choice_data_list:
You were on the edge of your seat, weren't
you?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... She was incredible. So skilled... and so
radiant!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
The farther McQueen ran, the more everyone
smiled...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
She's just like the blue rose from the picture
book!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, the blue rose that brings happiness to
everyone!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rice Shower excitedly retells the story of The Blue Rose of Good Fortune.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In a garden full of roses, a single blue rose bud
suddenly bloomed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There had never been a blue rose before, and the
people feared it. They called it the "flower of
misfortune" and kept their distance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But one day, someone bought the rose. "Why,
this blue rose is simply magnificent!" they
exclaimed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Then they—Big Brother—placed the blue rose on
his windowsill, and it bloomed so beautifully...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Then they—Big Sister—placed the blue rose on
her windowsill, and it bloomed so beautifully...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That the people walking by would smile from the
bottom of their hearts when they saw it.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Well, McQueen has always been well-liked, so it's
not exactly the same.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
But... I want to be like that. I want to be someone
who brings happiness instead of misfortune.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe. You don't have to try and cheer me up.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: But, if it's possible... I would like to be.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We watch Mejiro McQueen for a while longer and
then head home.
